message:
feat(abi): implement native DNS stub resolver, zero host delegations in resolv_abi

Replace the last host delegation in resolv_abi.rs with a native UDP DNS
stub resolver:

- udp_dns_query(): sends DNS query via raw SYS_socket/SYS_sendto/SYS_recvfrom
  syscalls with configurable timeout
- native_dns_resolve(): reads /etc/resolv.conf config, tries each
  nameserver with retry logic, applies search domain suffixes per ndots
- Queries both A (IPv4) and AAAA (IPv6) records
- Handles NXDOMAIN (returns empty), timeout (tries next nameserver)
- Reuses existing DnsMessage/DnsHeader/DnsRecord from frankenlibc-core

Protocol helpers moved to frankenlibc-core (parse_dns_response,
build_search_names) while network I/O stays in ABI layer.

Host delegation count in resolv_abi.rs: 1 → 0
Files fully cleared: 6 (unistd, rpc, glibc_internal, stdlib, resolv, setjmp-release)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
